candidates.snippet: ury. The font was designed principally as a poster typeface, in capital letters only, for the Danish theatre Aveny-T in 2000. This newly updated font family includes a full character set featuring lowercase letters, and

Sorbian, Vunjo, Walloon, Welsh, Western Frisian, Wolof, Xhosa, Zulu Manufacturer: A2-TYPE Designer: Henrik Kubel Year: 2015 Copyright: © A2-TYPE Trademark: Aveny-T is a trademark of A2-TYPE Licence: Terms and conditions
